data.title: feat(telegram): send text+attachment as single message using captions
data.description:
When a BotBus message has text and file attachments, send the file with the text as caption (up to Telegram's 1024 char limit) instead of sending separate messages.

Changes:
- Add TELEGRAM_CAPTION_MAX_CHARS constant (1024)
- If text fits in caption limit and exactly 1 file attachment, send file with text as caption
- If multiple file attachments and text fits, send first with caption, rest without
- Fall back to separate messages if text exceeds caption limit

Closes bd-13pg

data.reason: Security review: No issues found. Caption length properly bounded (1024 chars). File paths come from internal storage not user input. Fallback behavior on errors is safe. No injection, auth bypass, or resource exhaustion risks.
